news.title: Report: AI sales may justify buildout
news.description: [ARKANSAS ONLINE] Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.

news.title: Oil costs’ fall buoys Wall Street dragged by AI losses
news.description: [ARKANSAS ONLINE] NEW YORK -- Most of the U.S. stock market rose Friday after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for stocks swept up in the mania around artificial intelligence technology kept the market in check.
